지문: The shoreline was known for having the best fishing spots on the lake. Jessie was sitting at one of those spots, but her fishing line still hadn’t moved an inch. With a deep sigh, Jessie pulled out the line and cast it back into the water. Her dream of catching a big fish was fading. “I can’t believe I haven’t caught a fish yet. Not a single one,” she thought. Just as she was about to give up and leave, the fishing line suddenly became tense. Jessie excitedly held onto the fishing pole as it began to move around wildly. Her eyes widened and her heart began to beat faster with excitement. With a big smile, she could feel that this was the biggest fish she had ever caught!
어휘:
shoreline 호숫가, 해안가
fishing line 낚싯줄
sigh 한숨
cast 던지다
fade (점점) 사라지다
tense 팽팽한, 긴장된
fishing pole 낚싯대
wildly 격렬하게
widen (눈이) 커지다, 휘둥그레지다
문제:
다음 글에 드러난 Jessie의 심경 변화로 가장 적절한 것은?      ① disappointed  → thrilled 
② indifferent   → discouraged
③ jealous      → anxious 
④ delighted    → bored
⑤ relieved     → pleased
문법:
■ With a deep sigh, Jessie [pulled out the line] and [cast it back into the water].
두 개의 [  ]는 and로 연결되어 문장의 술어 역할을 한다. 
■ With a big smile, she could feel [that this was the biggest fish {she had ever caught}]! 
[  ]는 feel의 목적어 역할을 하는 명사절이고, 그 안의 {  }는 the biggest fish를 수식하는 관계절이다.
